data.body: FLAG DECISION (T2), maintainer-approved: canonical structured-output flag is `--output VALUE` with short alias `-o VALUE` (values: json|llm|text). Both legacy `--json` AND `--format=` are REMOVED (no back-compat aliases) — pre-1.0 breaking change. Rationale: OSS survey shows the selector convention dominates ~4:1 for multi-format tools, `-o/--output json` is the single most common spelling (kubectl/aws/az/helm), and `-o` is the expected short alias when the flag is named --output. rebar emits 2 machine formats (json+llm) so it's squarely selector-camp. Value syntax accepted: `-o json`, `--output json`, `--output=json`.
